steps.title: Identify the central relationship being tested
steps.content: Grasby et al. investigated whether “perceived category similarity predicts consumers' likelihood of purchasing brand extensions”—the core possibility they tested.

steps.title: Match the supporting evidence
steps.content: A strong positive correlation between consumers' similarity ratings and the probability changes proves that similarity predicts purchase behavior. The other findings do not demonstrate this connection. That matches choice C — C is correct.
